name: insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, inefficient identification of exceptions causes delayed claim resolutions. We monitor claims data and flag exceptions instead of manual review of claims data.
problem_solved: Inefficient identification of exceptions in claims data
